sprints.title: Onboarding Integrations Step: Route, Grid, Redirect, Cleanup
sprints.notes: All files created/modified/deleted per spec. Fixed @causeflow/shared import path (domain/constants/integrations -> constants). Rewrote 3 test files from @testing-library/react to vitest structural pattern (project doesn't use testing-library). Build, type-check, lint, tests all pass (131 files, 850 tests). Route /onboarding/integrations returns 200; /onboarding/connect-aws returns 404 (correctly removed). connect-aws-form.tsx also deleted (only used by removed route).
